authority_note: Generated from Maxwell Polymarket Gamma latest-market audit /tmp/zeus_weather_high_temp_audit_with_coords.json. Coordinates are authoritative settlement-station coordinates: AviationWeather stationinfo for ICAO/WU stations, weather.gov WRH/source endpoint for NOAA stations, and HKO station table for Hong Kong. For stale/no-exact Polymarket cities, station coordinates are filled from the earlier official stationinfo/HKO audit because coordinate authority is independent of current market activeness.
